transcript: And I gotta bring you your shipment here today.
And I just wanted to know the best time to do so, so...
Wh... wh... what do you mean, my "shipment"? What, what... what's that?
It's, uh... C.O.D., we need eight hundred and forty-eight dollars.
On the C.O.D., your... package. I have the, uh... signature on the package.
I... but... uh... I didn't order anything.
You got rocks and pebbles in your yard?
Why don't you go get it straightened up, now. Rake it, or whatever you need.
No, but I didn't order anything. Why... why you need to send me anything, huh?
What's the address? Whoever order? What...
Forget about it, I didn't order it.
Yeah, yeah. But what, what... what, what... what... what's the address?
Uh, I'm in, uh... I'm in Wheat Ridge.
Yeaaah, but I got the squid for ya. [exhales]
Yeah, I'm going to make it there in fifteen, twenty.
I got a big ol' squid.
And we're... I'll... they... I'll come, put it in the yard.
Go ahead and clean up your yard so I can... I... I need, uh... I need a check.
You're gonna write me a check.
And I'm gonna pick it up, and I'm gonna put the squid on you.
Uh huh? What... what... what's that mean?
You wanna meet out in the yard, and I'll push ya around? [heavy breathing into phone]
What's your name and phone number?
Where's your, uh... check book at? [heavy breathing into phone]
